# RoutePass

> Middleware for fitness activity data. Connect sources (Komoot, Garmin, Polar), connect destinations (Strava, Intervals.icu, Runalyze), define per-pipeline sync rules, and let your activities flow automatically. Free tier available. Pro at $29/year. Fully self-hostable under AGPL-3.0.

## Documentation

- [Quickstart](https://docs.routepass.online/getting-started/quickstart/): Connect your first source and destination in 5 minutes
- [Data Handling](https://docs.routepass.online/getting-started/data-handling/): What we store, encryption, deletion
- [Self-Hosting](https://docs.routepass.online/getting-started/self-hosting/): Docker setup, env vars, migrations
- [Connections Overview](https://docs.routepass.online/connections/overview/): Sources, destinations, pipelines
- [Komoot](https://docs.routepass.online/connections/komoot/): Credentials, polling, API limitations
- [Strava](https://docs.routepass.online/connections/strava/): OAuth, scopes, rate limits
- [Intervals.icu](https://docs.routepass.online/connections/intervals-icu/): API key setup
- [Runalyze](https://docs.routepass.online/connections/runalyze/): Token setup, GPX upload
- [Sync Rules Overview](https://docs.routepass.online/sync-rules/overview/): Rule chains, evaluation order
- [Conditions](https://docs.routepass.online/sync-rules/conditions/): sport_type, distance_km, elevation_m, duration_min, name_contains
- [Actions](https://docs.routepass.online/sync-rules/actions/): skip, set_sport_type, name_template, append_description, set_hide_from_home
- [API Authentication](https://docs.routepass.online/api/authentication/): JWT + API keys
- [API Reference](https://docs.routepass.online/api/reference/): Interactive Scalar UI + Postman import
- [Rate Limits](https://docs.routepass.online/api/rate-limits/): Strava shared pool, platform limits
- [Webhooks](https://docs.routepass.online/webhooks/): Outbound events, HMAC verification, retry policy

## API

- OpenAPI spec: https://api.routepass.online/openapi.json
- Interactive docs: https://api.routepass.online/docs
- Source: https://github.com/dettinjo/routepass
